title: 🚨 Newcastle, confident to seal Victor Muñoz deal very soon for package over €...

blocks.content: 🚨 Newcastle, confident to seal Victor Muñoz deal very soon for package over €30m after official bid sent today.Real Madrid have 50% sell-on clause and buy back clause but #NUFC optimistic to proceed quickly. ⚪️⚫️ https://t.co/TzyWfRuej1 — Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) Jun 11, 2026
